name: tape-lsp
description: Wire the `tape-lsp` server (canonical .tape v1.2 LSP — diagnostics + hover, zero deps) for `.tape` files in Claude Code. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Requires `tape-lsp` on PATH (install via `hx install dancinlab/tape`).
